The '''Sounder Flats computer complex''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] computer facility on [[Ruul (planet)|Ruul]], a planet in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. It was situated on [[Sounder Flats]], between a steep hill and a deep canyon. Two Imperial bases nearby and a network of turrets protected it. However, they did not prove enough when [[Brenn Tantor]] conducted an [[Mission to Ruul (Galactic Civil War)|information raid]], capturing the facility long enough for [[Beri Tulon]] to extract passcodes to approach the [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]] [[Trasse Proving Grounds|factory]] on [[Trasse/Legends|Trasse]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'' {{1st}}
